svg.title: How memspec works
svg.desc: AI agents talk to memspec through an MCP server or CLI. Memspec runs hybrid search over a markdown-canonical store, manages a lifecycle of active, superseded and retired memories, and anchors facts to git blob SHAs so it can flag drift when code changes.

g.text: per-type TTL, stale flag at read
facts tie to git blob SHAs · reconcile scans for drift
drifted anchors flag for review, never auto-deleted
